prompt: Showdown finish branch on river: choose action.
why_v1: By the river, this hand has reached showdown value, so checking is cleaner than turning it into a bluff.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This river finish has showdown value, so checking is cleaner than bluffing.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Betting turns showdown value into a bluff, but this river is better finished by checking.
